title: selaginella integerrima
intro: Selaginella integerrima, also known as Spiked Spike Moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Selaginella integerrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
